name: Chocolate Cherry Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 13 x 9-inch pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine cake mix, almond extract, cherry pie filling, and eggs. Stir by hand until well mixed.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake according to time limits on cake mix directions or until toothpick inserted in center comes out clean.
6. In a small saucepan, combine sugar, butter, and milk. Boil, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
7. Remove from heat and stir chocolate pieces immediately, beating until smooth.
8. Pour mixture over the baked cake.
9. Makes 36 servings.
